# FlipDeck Config – Flipper Zero
# Format: ACTION:Label:Symbol (max 6 per page)
# Page header: # page:PageName
# Available: PLAY NEXT PREV VOLUP VOLDN MUTE BRTUP BRTDN F13-F24

# page:Media
PLAY:Play:>
NEXT:Next:>>
PREV:Prev:<<
VOLUP:Vol+:+
VOLDN:Vol-:-
MUTE:Mute:X

# page:Custom
F13:Term:$
F14:Web:@
F15:Shot:[]
F16:Dark:*
F17:Paste:P
F18:Hook:!
